description: The deterministic P0-P16 phase spine for the Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine. The orchestrator run_cinematic_web_funnel.py runs this spine IN ORDER with no skips (front-door nonce required, ADR-6) and issues the signed PROCESS-CERTIFICATE only when every mandatory phase gate passes contiguously. A phase passes on artifacts + a deterministic gate script exit code, never on an agent's claim. Content methodology is delegated, never duplicated (ADR-10): Signature Funnel (49) and Sales-Page-Assets (56) own their sacred copy systems. Media generation extends the canonical Kie adapters in 47-movie-producer/kie-adapters/. GHL work rides Skill 6. CLIENT runtime uses the client's OWN providers, never Anthropic.

build_status.state: COMPLETE (offline) — identity, manifest, front door, orchestrator, all 17 phase-gate scripts, provider abstraction, schemas/state engine, budget/paid-call gate, content router, intake, scene planner, media generation, FFmpeg pipeline, seam QC, Next.js template + conversion layer, GHL/CRM conversion gate, Vercel deploy adapter, iframe embed package, accessibility/performance browser QC, and the signed process certificate all exist on disk. Every phase gate declared below resolves to a real script (scripts/*.py) with a deterministic --self-test and unit/integration/e2e coverage.
build_status.effect: The orchestrator drives the P0..P16 spine no-skip and certifies ONLY a fully-clean run: the P16-CERTIFY gate (scripts/prove_certificate.py) is the sole emitter of the HMAC-SHA256-signed PROCESS-CERTIFICATE.json, and run_cinematic_web_funnel.py preserves + independently re-verifies it (never overwrites it). A missing artifact, a failing gate, a secret VALUE, or an absent front-door nonce all withhold the certificate fail-closed. Certification is proven end-to-end OFFLINE against deterministic fixtures (spec 19.2 mocked-fixtures discipline).
build_status.still_held: The one real live canary project (checklist item 30 / U26) is deliberately HELD: no live paid Kie generation and no live Vercel/GHL deployment have run. Live-only assertions (real provider spend, real preview/production URLs, real GHL sandbox conversion) remain unproven pending an explicit operator-approved canary.

front_door.nonce: the run-scoped 0600 nonce keys the certificate HMAC; a direct orchestrator call without it dies AF-CWFE-FRONT-DOOR
front_door.rule: NOTHING runs a phase gate, calls a provider, touches GHL, or mints a certificate except THROUGH cinematic-web-funnel-entry.sh (ADR-6). Mirrors the fail-closed entry-shell pattern of Skills 49 and 56; hash-pin of the enforcement core is added once the phase gate scripts exist (a later unit) so there is something real to pin.

phases.name: Environment and dependency resolve
phases.produces_artifact: environment-receipt.json (resolved model map, Claude Code / Codex mapping)

phases.name: CRM integration
phases.delegate: 06-ghl-install-pages / 44-convert-and-flow-operator (Skill 6 is the one GHL delivery rail)

cross_cutting_af_codes.trigger: orchestrator invoked without a valid run-scoped nonce matching the front door's nonce file
a paid provider call attempted before P1 locked brief + P4 scene plan + a live registry price snapshot + P5 recorded cap approval + an idempotency check
a restarted/resumed run re-issues a paid provider call for a task already recorded complete in cost-ledger.json
this engine authors sacred copy itself instead of consuming a locked content manifest from Skill 49 or Skill 56 (ADR-10)
a secret value (not just its presence-by-name) appears in code, logs, receipts, manifests, or artifacts

delegation_seams.video: 47-movie-producer/kie-adapters :: kie_video.py (extended for bytedance/seedance-1.5-pro + input_urls frame pinning)
delegation_seams.ghl: 06-ghl-install-pages + 44-convert-and-flow-operator (Skill 6 is the one GHL delivery rail; workflows ride Skill 44)
delegation_seams.content_signature_funnel: 49-signature-funnel (sacred 12-section copy system; owns its own gates)
delegation_seams.content_direct_response: 56-sales-page-assets (sacred direct-response copy system; owns its own gates)
delegation_seams.client_provider_rule: CLIENT runtime uses the client's OWN configured providers on the client's OWN Kie.ai key. NEVER Anthropic on a client box.
